bio: Parker was the teddy bear of the Cluster P male group - a true gentle giant. He joined us in March 2023, already ear-tipped and a little battle-worn. During his time outside, he faced kidney and eye issues, but despite this, he remained calm and affectionate. He was fostered in May 2025 and moved again in June 2025, where he is still happily settled - a very good sign.
